MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sun Joo chung for defendant and moving party Zdenka Bodisco
Albert Lee for plaintiff and opposing party: Marguerite Lee

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Zdenka Bodisco's motion to quash the subpoena as to Ernie Boden is denied.
Defendant's motion to quash the subpoenas to Allstate Insurance is denied as to the request for all bills, invoices, and payment requests and the February 22, 2003 letter. The Court will modify the subpoenas to require that the witness produce all non-privileged documents pursuant to category C of the subpoena. If the witness intends to assert a claim of either the attorney client or attorney work product privilege as to particular documents, said documents shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log so the trial court may rule on the validity of any objection. The privilege log shall be served on counsel for plaintiff on or before September 29, 2006 by either FAX or personal delivery. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
Compliance date: September 26, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
